title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski moderates a panel with engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing how they have adopted AI coding tools at scale. The panel covers workflow changes, productivity measurement, and lessons learned, including examples such as DoorDash's small pods completing nine-month roadmaps in one month and Atlassian's engineers spending 85% of time on non-coding work.
